qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t0.oi_tipo_eval as id, SEC.policy, t0.c_tipo_eval, t0.d_tipo_eval, t0.d_reporte, t0.oi_escala, t0.oi_clase_org, t0.l_eva2, t0.l_eva3, t0.l_pree, t0.l_eva360 from EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL as t0, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.TIPO_EVAL\') as SEC join t0.oi_tipo_eval LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY id ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t0.oi_tipo_eval as id, SEC.policy from EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL as t0, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.TIPO_EVAL\') as SEC join t0.oi_tipo_eval LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY id ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.TIPO_EVAL.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.oi_tipo_eval as ID, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.c_tipo_eval as COD, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.d_tipo_eval as DES, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.c_tipo_eval as c_tipo_eval, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.d_tipo_eval as d_tipo_eval, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.d_reporte as d_reporte, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.l_eva2 as l_eva2, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.l_eva3 as l_eva3, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.l_pree as l_pree, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.l_eva360 as l_eva360, ORG29_ESCALAS.d_escala as DES_oi_escala, ORG02_CLASES_ORG.d_clase_org as DES_oi_clase_org FROM EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL, ORG29_ESCALAS, ORG02_CLASES_ORG JOIN EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ORG29_ESCALAS.oi_escala, EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.oi_clase_org LEFT OUTER ORG02_CLASES_ORG.oi_clase_org WHERE EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL.oi_tipo_eval in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_REPORTE
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILESTORE('HTML/{%=#SOURCE:@file %}')/html:html

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FS('./APP/{%=#PROXY:@app%}/HTML')/LIST/FILE[contains(upper_case(@name),'.EVALUACION2.PLA_')]

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILESTORE('HTML/{%=#SOURCE:@name %}')/html:html

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.PLANTILLA.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla as ID, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.c_plantilla as COD, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.d_plantilla as DES, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.c_plantilla as c_plantilla, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.d_plantilla as d_plantilla, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_orden as e_orden, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.c_tipo_plantilla as c_tipo_plantilla, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.d_reporte as d_reporte, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.l_mostrar_res as l_mostrar_res, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.l_habilitada as l_habilitada, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.n_ponderacion as n_ponderacion, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_show as e_show, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_preeva as e_preeva, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_evaluador as e_evaluador, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_evaluado as e_evaluado, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_supervisor as e_supervisor, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_aprobacion as e_aprobacion, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.e_posaprob as e_posaprob, ESC1.d_escala as DES_oi_escala, ESC2.d_escala as DES_oi_escala_item, ESC3.d_escala as DES_oi_escala_subitem FROM EDD01_PLANTILLAS, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC1, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC2, ORG29_ESCALAS as ESC3 JOIN EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ESC1.oi_escala, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala_item LEFT OUTER ESC2.oi_escala, EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_escala_subitem LEFT OUTER ESC3.oi_escala WHERE EDD01_PLANTILLAS.oi_plantilla in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL_TIPO_PLANTILLA_2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILEIO('EVALUACIONES/{%=$SOURCE/@c_tipo_plantilla %}')/qry:define

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FS('./NOMAD/EVALUACIONES')/LIST/FILE[ends_with(upper_case(@name),'.TYPE_PLA.XML')]

qry:select.name: SQL3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILEIO('EVALUACIONES/{%=#SOURCE:@name %}')/qry:define

resource.declare: <DATA PARENT="306" ID="513" VALUES="313|315|413|513|314" e_show="" e_preeva="" e_evaluador="" e_evaluado="" e_supervisor="" e_aprobacion="" e_posaprob="" d_cus1="" d_cus2="" d_cus3="" d_cus4="" d_cus5=""/>
resource.name: TIPOS_REPORTES

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select TY.d_reporte as REPORT from EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL as TY where TY.oi_tipo_eval = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in FILESTORE('HTML/{%=#SOURCE:@REPORT %}')/html:html/html:xslt/xsl:template[@name='COMBO_TEMPLATES']/OPT

resource.declare: <DATA PARENT="306" ID="513" VALUES="313|315|413|513|314" e_show="" e_preeva="" e_evaluador="" e_evaluado="" e_supervisor="" e_aprobacion="" e_posaprob="" d_cus1="" d_cus2="" d_cus3="" d_cus4="" d_cus5=""/>
resource.name: ADIC

qry:select.name: SQL_DATA
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' select TY.l_eva2, TY.l_eva3, TY.l_pree, TY.l_eva360 from EDD01_TIPOS_EVAL as TY where TY.oi_tipo_eval = {#SOURCE:@PARENT} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.OBJETIVO.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD01_OBJETIVOS.oi_objetivo as ID, EDD01_OBJETIVOS.c_objetivo as COD, EDD01_OBJETIVOS.d_objetivo as DES, EDD01_OBJETIVOS.c_objetivo as c_objetivo, EDD01_OBJETIVOS.d_objetivo as d_objetivo, EDD01_OBJETIVOS.n_ponderacion as n_ponderacion, ORG29_ESCALAS.d_escala as DES_oi_escala FROM EDD01_OBJETIVOS, ORG29_ESCALAS JOIN EDD01_OBJETIVOS.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ORG29_ESCALAS.oi_escala WHERE EDD01_OBJETIVOS.oi_objetivo in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Evaluacion2.Tipos_Evaluacion.SUBOBJETIVO.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL('SELECT EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_subobjetivo as ID, EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.c_subobjetivo as COD, EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.d_subobjetivo as DES, EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.c_subobjetivo as c_subobjetivo, EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.d_subobjetivo as d_subobjetivo, EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.n_ponderacion as n_ponderacion, ORG29_ESCALAS.d_escala as DES_oi_escala FROM EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS, ORG29_ESCALAS JOIN EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_escala LEFT OUTER ORG29_ESCALAS.oi_escala WHERE EDD01_SUBOBJETIVOS.oi_subobjetivo in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %})')/ROWS/ROW
